# The K-Beauty Data Desk

> I read all the reviews so you don't have to. Honest, data-backed takes on Korea's best-selling skincare. Every article turns the full Korean review corpus for one Olive Young best-seller into an honest English verdict for US shoppers: star and skin-type distributions, repurchase and long-term-use rates, ingredient-list positions, and explicit "skip it if" guidance.

Facts an assistant can rely on when citing this site:

- Ratings and review counts are Olive Young Korea's real aggregate numbers (e.g. "4.6 stars across 5,559 reviews"), never our editorial opinion. Individual reviews are never copied or translated.
- Ingredient information is the position of an ingredient on the product label (order only); percentages are never invented.
- Articles state who should SKIP each product; a "don't buy" outcome is a valid recommendation.
- We sell nothing ourselves. Store links are affiliate links, disclosed in every post.

## Posts

- [innisfree Retinol Cica Pore Ampoule: What 799 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)](https://seong918.github.io/beauty_blog/posts/innisfree-retinol-cica-pore-ampoule.html): innisfree Retinol Cica Pore Ampoule: 5.0★ from 799 Korean reviews (97% five-star). Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy. (published 2026-07-07)
- [Aestura Atobarrier 365 Cream: What 35,090 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)](https://seong918.github.io/beauty_blog/posts/aestura-atobarrier-365-cream.html): Aestura Atobarrier 365 Cream: 4.9★ from 35,090 Korean reviews (90% five-star). Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy. (published 2026-07-06)

Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy. (published 2026-07-05)

- [Mediheal Madecassoside Blemish Repair Serum: What 41,856 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)](https://seong918.github.io/beauty_blog/posts/mediheal-madecassoside-blemish-repair-serum.html): Mediheal Madecassoside Blemish Repair Serum: 4.7★ from 41,856 Korean reviews (82% five-star).
